completed_slice: Added a fail-closed validator and deterministic tests that bind the Cloudflare Pages workflow to the committed wrangler project name, Pages output directory, declared branch input, and exact github.sha commit.
verification: Four deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files. Current wrangler and workflow contracts were inspected and match the new validator's expected project, output, branch, and commit bindings.
remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still needs valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values, followed by an actual workflow dispatch that returns a provider deployment identity and resolving URL.
next_action: Wire validate-cloudflare-config-parity.test.mjs and the validator invocation into the deployment workflow before the readiness and access-probe steps, then dispatch the workflow after environment credentials are configured.
